response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript/Node.js and hands-on AI-agent infrastructure development (MCP code generators), which is a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing libraries authored) align well with the role's quality expectations. Gaps are mostly at the framework level — Nest.js, Kotlin, and the specific test runners (Vitest/Playwright) are not evidenced — but the depth of polyglot backend and frontend experience makes these learnable quickly.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js product work
Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP tooling, agentic workflow frameworks)
Strong testing/craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated/limited
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named, though testing depth suggests fast ramp-up
